description:
Undocumented internal API powering the public API discovery surface at
postman.com/explore. All requests funnel through a single proxy endpoint
as POST with body `{service, method, path, body?}`. This spec models the
logical endpoints; the proxy envelope is implemented by the generated
client (client_pattern: proxy-envelope).

No authentication required. Unauthenticated browsing only â€” this CLI does
not model the authenticated Postman product surface (workspace management,
private API networks, account features). Scope is strictly community
collection / workspace / API / flow discovery on the public network.

tools.name: category_get
tools.description: Returns full details for a category by its URL slug (e.g., `artificial-intelligence`, `developer-productivity`, `payments`). Includes hero image, icon, and category-specific featured entities. Required: slug.

tools.name: category_list-categories
tools.description: Returns all categories used to organize the API network (e.g., AI, E-commerce, Communication, DevOps). Categories are spotlighted â€” the response order matches the category strip on postman.com/explore. Optional: sort (default: spotlighted).

tools.name: networkentity_get-network-entity
tools.description: Returns full entity record by internal numeric id (the `id` field from `listNetworkEntities`, NOT the `entityId` UUID). Required: id.

tools.name: networkentity_get-network-entity-counts
tools.description: Returns aggregate counts across the entire public API network: collections, workspaces, APIs, flows, notebooks, teams. This is the only stats endpoint exposed by the proxy. Optional: flattenAPIVersions (default: true).

params.name: flattenAPIVersions
params.description: When true, flattens API versions into the apiCount total

tools.name: networkentity_list-network-entities
tools.description: List public collections, workspaces, APIs, or flows. Supports category filtering, pagination, and minimum-fork filtering. This is the primary browse endpoint powering postman.com/explore/{collections,workspaces,apis,flows}. Note on sort: only `popular` is reliably supported. Other values like `recent`, `new`, `week`, `alltime` return HTTP 400 'Invalid sort type'. Required: entityType. Optional: limit (default: 20), offset (default: 0), sort (default: popular) (plus 2 more). Returns array of NetworkEntity.

params.name: sort
params.description: Sort order (only `popular` is reliably supported by the proxy)

params.name: minMonthlyForkCount
params.description: Filter to entities with at least N monthly forks (trending discovery)

tools.name: search-all_search_all
tools.description: Search collections, workspaces, requests, flows, and teams by free-text query. With no `queryIndices` set, the response groups results by entity type (object-keyed `data.{collection,workspace,api,flow,team,request}`). With one or more dotted indices set (`runtime.collection`, `collaboration.workspace`, `apinetwork.team`, `flow.flow`, `runtime.request`), the response narrows to those types. This is the engine behind the search bar on postman.com. Required: queryText. Optional: domain (default: public), from (default: 0), mergeEntities (default: true) (plus 3 more). Returns the new SearchResponse.

params.name: domain
params.description: Search scope (all observed values return public-network results)

params.name: queryIndices
params.description:
Dotted index names to narrow the search. Omit to search across all
entity types. Valid values: `runtime.collection`, `collaboration.workspace`,
`apinetwork.team`, `flow.flow`, `runtime.request`.

tools.name: team_get
tools.description: Returns small profile object (id, name, description, publicHandle, profileURL, createdAt, updatedAt) for a team by its numeric id. For full workspace listing use `/v1/api/team?publicHandle=`. Required: id.

tools.name: team_get-workspaces
tools.description: Returns the array of public workspaces owned by a team identified by its `publicHandle` (e.g., `stripedev`, `salesforce-developers`, `meta`). Use `/v1/api/networkentity/{id}` for individual entity detail. Required: publicHandle.
